title: fix: tier_event pollen_amount Int32 → Float64, add tinybird logging
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Counting every drop
gist.blurb: Fixed a schema mismatch where fractional pollen was getting lost in the pipes. Now tracking every 0.1 pollen with precision.
gist.summary: Updated Tinybird datasource schema from Int32 to Float64 to support fractional pollen amounts and added verbose logging for bulk refill events.
gist.impact: Ensures accurate ingestion of tier events into analytics and provides better visibility into refill process failures.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature (data consumer) is happily eating a stream of floating point numbers (1.5, 0.1) instead of just integers. The bee mascot watches with a clipboard, checking the math.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating glowing lime green (#ecf874) numbers floating in the air, specifically decimals like '1.5'. The bee mascot stands nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic.
